name: @ccsm/smoke
description: Local-only S3 full-stack happy-path smoke (Tauri shell -> daemon -> wrangler dev cf-worker tunnel -> Pages functions -> Playwright chromium). Not run in CI.

scripts.test: echo 'smoke is run via `pnpm smoke:run` (after a one-shot `pnpm smoke:build`); skipped under `pnpm -r test` because it requires a real Tauri release exe + wrangler dev + a real chromium' && exit 0
